subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-21 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Prior to the revelation of the Prophet Muhammad, the Apostle of God, the practice of polygamy was so prevalent
subcodes.first_line_orig: قبل از بعثت رسول الله ص تعدد زوجات بین اعراب چنان رواج و کثرتی داشت که دفعةً ممکن نبود
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @Islamic laws and jurisprudence, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity
